destinations.evidence: read_scheduled_call returns None for absent storage/mismatched call id, and verification converts that to ScheduledConstraintViolation::CallNotFound.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port; this is the same C1 missing-call behavior as invariant 118.
rationale: This packet is a later formulation of the same C1 verification behavior. Current tip evidence shows read_scheduled_call returning None or read failure is converted into CallNotFound in scheduled verification.
statement: Scheduled transaction verification must reject a scheduled transaction whose call_id has no corresponding Scheduler contract storage entry, returning ScheduledConstraintViolation::CallNotFound with that call id.
suggested_falsification_tests: Verify absent call_id and assert returned CallNotFound contains that call_id.
summary: Absent Scheduler calls are rejected with CallNotFound.
title: Scheduled verification rejects absent Scheduler calls
